meta.title: Molecular analysis of Irish sheep scrapie cases

bodyHtml:
Journal of General Virology (2000), 81, 1621–162

Page 1621. Two spelling mistakes were printed in the author line. In addition, addresses 1 and 3 contained errors. The correct names and addresses are shown above.
affiliationsHtml:
• Pre-Clinical Division, Faculty of Veterinary Medicine and Conway Institute, University College Dublin, Ireland1
  • Federal Research Centre for Virus Diseases of Animals, PO Box 1149, 72001 Tübingen, Germany2
  • Department of Pathology, Central Veterinary Laboratory, Abbottstown, Ireland3
